title: High Plains Thunder Is Out Now
excerpt: Our new EP is finally here. Five tracks recorded raw, live-to-tape, no fixes — exactly how we play it on stage.
content:
## It's Here

After nearly a year in the making, **High Plains Thunder** is out now on all platforms.

We recorded these five tracks the same way we've always recorded — raw, live-to-tape, together in a room. No fixing it in the mix. No samples. Just four guys playing as hard as they can.

*High Plains Thunder* is the truest thing we've put out. We hope it hits you the same way it hit us when we played it back for the first time.

**Stream it everywhere. Buy the vinyl. Come see us live.**

title: Summer 2026 Tour Dates Announced
excerpt: We're hitting the road this summer. Fort Worth, Austin, Dallas, and more — tickets on sale soon.
content:
## Summer 2026 — We're Coming

We've been in the garage for the past few months working on new material, and it's time to bring it to the stage.

This summer we're playing some of our favorite venues across Texas — Billy Bob's to kick things off, then Austin and Dallas to close out the run.

More dates TBA. If you want us in your city, reach out through the contact page.

**Tickets go on sale at show venues. Check back for links.**
